description: CI bounds swapped — the confidence interval lower bound is greater than the upper bound (CI lower > CI upper), which is logically impossible.

detection_expectation.rule_violated: CI lower bound must be <= CI upper bound
detection_expectation.correct_action: Flag CI bounds swapped: Experimental ci_lower=13.5 > ci_upper=9.8. Both arms affected — likely column reversal.

metadata.notes: Obvious error when checked; likely column transposition in output generation. Both arms affected.
